name: whiteboard-me
description: Whiteboard-Me — research-grounded work-life map: a whiteboard-sketch infographic of who you are professionally today (what you do, who you work with, values, tools, what you're building), grounded in the owner OS and rendered as crisp HTML/SVG — never a one-shot AI image. v0.2: locked landscape layout with drawn (never dashed) rings, sketched logo icons, tiered portrait pipeline (AI sketch redraw → Adobe vectorize → deterministic), IG teaser recipe, and GHL Social Planner draft staging. The shareable wedge.
